reviews.comment:
No cargué combustible, sólo tomé un café con unas medialunas..., ESPANTOSO...,pocas veces he tomado un café tan feo..., y las medialunas tranquilamente podrían ser las peores que comí en mi vida

(Translated by Google)
I didn't fill up with fuel, I just had a coffee and some croissants... AWFUL... I've rarely had such bad coffee... and the croissants could easily be the worst I've ever eaten.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNczdHWUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy concurrido, es casi inusual no hacer una larga cola de casi una cuadra para poder cargar combustible. La atención no es buena, no hay un buen trato con los clientes (puede haber excepciones como en todo lugar) pero si buscas cargar nafta rápido, deberías ir al mediodía porque a la mañana y a la noche es siempre muy concurrido (salvo la madrugada tipo 2 o 3 am.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very busy place; it's almost unusual not to have to wait in a line that stretches for nearly a block to get gas. The service isn't great, and customers aren't treated well (there might be exceptions, as everywhere), but if you need to fill up quickly, you should go around midday because it's always very crowded in the morning and evening (except around 2 or 3 am).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNczhIRVZ3EAE
